reason: Replace the unsafe pan-African auto-tax and compliance generator with a private reconciliation draft. Users enter and confirm every earning, reimbursement, employee deduction and employer-only contribution. The engine calculates gross earnings, total deductions, net pay and employer cost without inferring PAYE, pension, insurance, minimum wage, deduction authority, remittance, filing or legal compliance. ILO C095 supplies high-level wage-protection context and South Africa BCEA4 is presented only as one structural example, not a pan-African prescription. No protected golden fixture existed, so the new engine registration has no carried result delta.
